title: Flaky Mediterranean Eggplant Stir-fry
description: A crisp, mustard-infused eggplant dish brimming with shio-koji umami and Mediterranean flair. Perfect for a quick paleo dinner that delivers bold flavors and satisfying texture.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Slice the eggplant into 1/2-inch thick sticks and pat them dry.
Whisk shio‑koji, mustard, garlic, chili flakes, lemon juice, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Toss the eggplant sticks in the sauce until well coated.
Add olive oil to the skillet and heat until shimmering.
Add the eggplant in a single layer, cooking 3-4 minutes per side until golden and crisp.
Remove from heat, drizzle any leftover sauce over the fried eggplant, and sprinkle with parsley and toasted pine nuts.
Serve hot over sautéed spinach or a bed of roasted cauliflower.
